specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/10 (any version where bunnies can flop and hop freely)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 2.0 GHz or AMD equivalent (or any chip that doesn’t fall asleep mid-hop)
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon R3 Graphics (may not paint carrots in 4K, but it works).
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Without it, you’ll only see carrots, not feel them.
  • Additional Notes: Game may cause excessive squeaking and hopping around your room
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or newer (burrow-friendly)
  • Processor: Something faster than a bunny dash.
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: A card powerful enough to draw fluffy ears in HD.
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Mandatory, because silence makes the bunny nervous.
  • Additional Notes: Game optimized for tiny bunny brain capacity
